notes: Extended cases for removing values from the stack until a target value is on top.

cases.name: sample_remove_until_stack
expect_contains_all: The resulting stack after removing values until the given value: 4 5 6 7

cases.name: target_at_top_keeps_stack
expect_contains_all: The resulting stack after removing values until the given value: 1 2 3

cases.name: target_at_bottom_leaves_one_item
expect_contains_all: The resulting stack after removing values until the given value: 1
